name: Example OLTP Workload
description: Sample OLTP workload with point selects and updates

queries.sql: SELECT k FROM sbtest1 WHERE id = 5000
UPDATE sbtest1 SET k = k + 1 WHERE id = 2000
SELECT * FROM sbtest1 WHERE k BETWEEN 1000 AND 2000 LIMIT 10
INSERT INTO sbtest1 (id, k, c, pad) SELECT MAX(id)+1, 12345, 'test', 'pad' FROM sbtest1
